accounts.name: Qiddiya
accounts.tip: Incumbent PMIS advisor. PIF entertainment giga-programme $40B+. Oracle/SAP/P6/Aconex deployed. Programme Governance & Digital Twin Phase 2.

engagements.title: Phase 3 Programme Governance Reset
engagements.description: Multi-contractor portfolio governance redesign as Qiddiya transitions to city-scale delivery. EPS baseline reset, schedule integrity framework for the 2030 Expo deadline.

engagements.title: Digital Twin Operationalisation
engagements.description: Move from Omniverse POC to live operational twin — use case definition, IoT data governance, asset information requirements for FM handover. Ivan is the only advisor with live Omniverse deployment on this programme.

engagements.title: PIF ROI Reporting & Assurance
engagements.description: With PIF mandating 20% spending cuts, QIC leadership needs independent validation of EPC-reported delivery data for PIF board reporting. EY's independence from all EPCs is the structural credential.

accounts.name: SAR
accounts.tip: Saudi Arabia Railways. Schedule Health & EPMO design. 18-month bid familiarity. Landbridge $7B PPP.

engagements.title: Owner-Side Schedule Health Assessment
engagements.description: SAR relies on EPC-submitted P6 schedules with no confirmed owner-side baseline governance. Independent health assessment across Landbridge, Qiddiya link, and network expansion.

engagements.title: EPMO Design & Programme Controls Framework
engagements.description: SAR is managing multiple concurrent capital programmes with no unified owner-side EPMO producing portfolio intelligence. Design the EPMO operating model, controls framework, and reporting architecture.

engagements.title: Oracle OAC Capital Delivery Integration
engagements.description: OAC deployed for finance — capital project delivery data not integrated. The gap between financial reporting and programme delivery means SAR cannot present a coherent ROI picture to PIF.

engagements.title: Smart Rail Digital Twin Strategy
engagements.description: SAR has publicly confirmed Digital Twin and 5G monitoring ambitions for track infrastructure. Long-life rail assets create the strongest Digital Twin business case of any infrastructure class.

accounts.name: Expo 2030 Riyadh
accounts.tip: RFP active. Bechtel PMC. Owner-side assurance above Bechtel. 6km², 42M visitors, Oct 2030 hard deadline. Budget protected from PIF cuts.

engagements.title: Owner-Side Programme Assurance — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping EY's role as independent programme adviser above Bechtel PMC for Expo 2030 Riyadh.

engagements.title: Owner-Side Programme Assurance Above Bechtel
engagements.description: ERC receives all construction intelligence through Bechtel. Independent advisory: is the delivery trajectory credible for Oct 2030? Are 226 pavilion packages converging on schedule?

engagements.title: PMIS Strategy — 246-Entity Programme
engagements.description: PMIS architecture managing owner-delivered infrastructure and 246 participant-delivered pavilions in a single programme intelligence framework.

engagements.title: iCCC & Smart Expo Strategy
engagements.description: Integrated Command & Control for 42M visitors across 6km². Ivan's TASMU and KSPF iCCC experience is the direct credential.

engagements.title: Legacy Transition — Global Village Governance
engagements.description: Post-Expo, 6km² becomes Global Village permanent district. Full-lifecycle advisory: asset information management, FM data governance, Digital Twin continuity.

accounts.name: FIFA 2034 · WCA34
accounts.tip: RFP active. 15 stadiums, 5 cities, chaired by Crown Prince MBS. Governance crisis live. Qiddiya & New Murabba contain FIFA 2034 stadiums.

engagements.title: Multi-City Stadium Governance — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping owner-side programme governance across 15 FIFA 2034 stadium sites in 5 cities.

engagements.title: Multi-City Stadium Programme Governance
engagements.description: 15 stadiums across 5 cities, each with a separate PMC or EPC — WCA34 needs a unified owner-side programme intelligence framework.

engagements.title: Smart Stadium & Digital Twin Strategy
engagements.description: WCA34 has committed to technology redefining how fans interact at matches. Smart stadium strategy, Digital Twin for venue operations, iCCC for tournament operations.

engagements.title: FIFA Delivery Milestone Assurance
engagements.description: FIFA imposes formal delivery milestones and stadium certification requirements. Independent advisory: are 15 programmes on credible trajectories for the June 2034 tournament?

engagements.title: ISO 19650 Information Management — Portfolio
engagements.description: 15 stadiums, 50+ organisations producing BIM models in different formats. Without ISO 19650 at portfolio level, WCA34 will receive disconnected asset data.

accounts.name: ROSHN Group
accounts.tip: PIF housing developer. $120B+ portfolio. PMWeb award-winning but ERP integration gap structural at multi-region scale.

engagements.title: EPMO Governance Redesign — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping EPMO governance redesign as ROSHN scales to 7+ active regions simultaneously.

engagements.title: Multi-Region EPMO Governance Architecture
engagements.description: As ROSHN scales to 7+ regions, the EPMO governance model needs redesign — decision rights, cost consolidation architecture, and contractor management.

engagements.title: PIF Delivery Assurance Retainer
engagements.description: With 20% PIF spending cuts mandated, ROSHN leadership needs ongoing independent programme assurance across 7+ regions.

engagements.title: SAP — PMWeb Integration Diagnostic
engagements.description: The ERP to PMWeb cost reconciliation gap is structural at portfolio scale. Ivan has solved this on Oracle at Qiddiya — the advisory is transferable.

accounts.name: King Salman Park
accounts.tip: $38B · 17.2km² · 2027 opening. Seven warm contacts. Parsons PMO. Digital Twin & iCCC mandates open.

engagements.title: Programme Intelligence — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping owner-side programme intelligence mandate above Parsons PMO at King Salman Park Foundation.

engagements.title: Owner-Side Programme Intelligence
engagements.description: Independent review of programme performance above Parsons' delivery reporting. Is the schedule data accurate? Are cost-to-complete figures defensible?

engagements.title: iCCC Design & Smart City Integration
engagements.description: 70,000 daily visitors projected. An Integrated Command & Control Centre is a mandatory operational requirement at this scale. Ivan's TASMU iCCC experience is the direct advisory credential.

engagements.title: Digital Twin Governance
engagements.description: CEO confirmed Digital Twin in active development. The governance layer — data architecture, CDE design, asset information requirements — is open. Ivan's Omniverse POC is the direct credential.

engagements.title: Construction-to-Operations Handover
engagements.description: With 2027 opening target, KSPF is approaching the handover phase. ISO 19650 asset information requirements, BIM-to-FM data governance, operational readiness advisory.

accounts.name: Diriyah (DGDA)
accounts.tip: $63B UNESCO heritage programme. Mace Consult sitewide PMC. $1.5B Arena Block awarded June 2025.

engagements.title: Owner-Side Programme Intelligence
engagements.description: DGDA receives all programme data through Mace. Independent advisory layer: is Mace's schedule and cost reporting accurate? Are packages converging on the 2027 Arena Block target?

engagements.title: Heritage Asset Information Management
engagements.description: A UNESCO World Heritage Site has asset information requirements beyond standard BIM governance — heritage documentation, conservation records, regulatory compliance.

engagements.title: Multi-Contractor Cost Control Governance
engagements.description: As Diriyah accelerates with multiple packages, an owner-side cost control framework above Mace is the governance gap.

engagements.title: Digital Twin for Heritage Environment
engagements.description: Active construction + UNESCO conservation creates a unique Digital Twin mandate. Ivan's Omniverse experience is the credential.

accounts.name: King Salman Airport
accounts.tip: $30B · 57km² · 3 PMCs simultaneously: Mace, Bechtel, Parsons. Hard deadlines: Expo 2030 + FIFA 2034.

engagements.title: Multi-Firm Governance — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping owner-side programme governance above Mace, Bechtel, and Parsons delivery chains at KSIA.

engagements.title: Owner-Side Multi-Firm Programme Governance
engagements.description: Three firms each managing separate scopes across 57km². KSIADC needs owner-side intelligence above all three firms simultaneously.

engagements.title: Expo 2030 Delivery Assurance
engagements.description: Airport must be operational for Expo 2030. Independent assurance: is the current delivery trajectory credible for a 2030 operational opening?

engagements.title: ISO 19650 Information Management
engagements.description: Designed by Jacobs and Foster+Partners, delivered by Mace, Bechtel, and Parsons — five organisations producing disconnected asset data without ISO 19650 governance.

engagements.title: Aviation Digital Twin Strategy
engagements.description: KSIA designed as an aerotropolis — 9 terminals, 6 runways, 57km² of airside and landside operations.

accounts.name: Saudi Aramco
accounts.tip: $40B+ annual capex. Worley GES+ contract. SAP↔PMIS cost reconciliation structural problem. Highest single fee in portfolio.

engagements.title: SAP — PMIS Cost Reconciliation Advisory
engagements.description: Structural mismatch between SAP PS/MM/FI actuals and PMIS committed/forecast data across Aramco's capital portfolio. Ivan resolved this at sovereign scale.

engagements.title: Capital Programme Controls — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Initial assessment of capital programme controls maturity across Aramco's $40B+ annual capex portfolio.

engagements.title: Capital Programme Controls Maturity
engagements.description: With $40B annual capex and dividend cuts creating pressure, Aramco needs independent assessment: are schedules trustworthy? Are cost-to-complete figures defensible?

engagements.title: PMIS Strategy & Business Case
engagements.description: An owner-side PMIS strategy advisory: is the current architecture fit for purpose at Aramco's scale?

accounts.name: New Murabba
accounts.tip: $38B · 3 PMCs (Bechtel/Turner/AECOM). Contains FIFA 2034 stadium. Naver Cloud MoU.

engagements.title: PMIS Strategy — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping owner-side PMIS strategy to consolidate data from Bechtel, Turner Arabia, and AECOM reporting chains.

engagements.title: Owner-Side PMIS Strategy Above Three PMCs
engagements.description: Three PMCs producing three report formats — NMDC cannot see the programme as a whole. Define the owner-side PMIS architecture consolidating all three PMC chains.

engagements.title: Multi-PMC Schedule Governance
engagements.description: Three PMCs submitting P6 schedules in different EPS structures with no owner-side baseline governance.

engagements.title: FIFA 2034 Delivery Certainty
engagements.description: New Murabba's programme interface with FIFA 2034 stadium delivery creates a hard deadline governance requirement.

accounts.name: Khazna Data Centers
accounts.tip: 30+ facilities. $26.2B financing. Stargate UAE partner. NexOps/Presight AI launched Feb 2026.

engagements.title: Handover Intelligence — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping handover intelligence architecture connecting Turner & Townsend construction delivery to NexOps operational systems.

engagements.title: Construction-to-Operations Handover Intelligence
engagements.description: NexOps has 5,000 operational documents but the data architecture connecting T&T construction delivery to NexOps operational systems is open. ISO 19650, BIM-to-FM, commissioning data integration.

engagements.title: NexOps Governance Framework
engagements.description: Presight AI provides the platform. The governance framework above it — data quality standards, integration architecture — is open.

engagements.title: Portfolio PMIS Strategy — 30+ Facilities
engagements.description: T&T manages construction delivery but Khazna leadership needs owner-side portfolio visibility across 30+ simultaneous construction and expansion phases.

engagements.title: International Expansion Governance
engagements.description: With $26.2B financing and active international expansion, Khazna's programme governance model needs to scale globally.

accounts.name: Red Sea Global
accounts.tip: IOC Operating Model delivered — warm relationships. PIF spending cuts heaviest here. Phase 1 resorts operational.

engagements.title: IOC Maturity Assessment
engagements.description: IOC Operating Model is in place. The maturity question: is the IOC producing the operational intelligence RSG leadership needs? This is the next advisory mandate.

engagements.title: Construction-Operations Concurrent Governance
engagements.description: Phase 1 operational + Phase 2+ construction active simultaneously across a Belgium-scale footprint. Governing a programme that is simultaneously building and operating requires a governance architecture most advisors have never designed.

engagements.title: PIF ROI Validation Retainer
engagements.description: RSG under heaviest spending pressure of any PIF giga-project. Leadership needs ongoing independent ROI validation to present a credible case to PIF leadership.

engagements.title: Asset Handover & FM Integration
engagements.description: As Phase 1 assets hand over from construction to operations, data quality of what PMCs deliver to RSG FM teams becomes a live operational risk.

accounts.name: TAQA
accounts.tip: Abu Dhabi integrated utilities. AED 75B investment pipeline to 2030. ~27GW new capacity. Multi-segment capital portfolio across generation, water, T&D.

engagements.title: Capital Controls — Entry Brief
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping owner-side programme controls and PMIS governance across TAQA's multi-segment capital portfolio.

engagements.title: Owner-Side Capital Programme Controls
engagements.description: Owner-side capital programme controls and PMIS governance across generation, water and T&D portfolio — exactly the scale where no single owner-side controls layer currently exists.

engagements.title: Energy & Water Asset-Performance Intelligence
engagements.description: Digital Twin operational intelligence and ISO 19650 information management across TAQA's generation, water, and T&D asset portfolio.

accounts.name: Abu Dhabi Master Developers
accounts.tip: Aldar · Miral · MODON. EY audit relationships across UAE master developer ecosystem. Multi-asset Oracle PMIS governance.

engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping Oracle PMIS governance for Aldar Properties capital programme.

engagements.title: Oracle PMIS Governance — Entry Brief (Miral)
engagements.description: Concept proposal scoping Oracle PMIS governance for Miral capital programme.

engagements.title: Oracle PMIS Governance — Multi-Asset Portfolio
engagements.description: Oracle PMIS governance and capital controls across Aldar Properties, Miral, and MODON — combined capital deployment creating programme oversight complexity no single developer has resolved at portfolio level.

engagements.description: Digital Twin lifecycle advisory and multi-asset portfolio controls across the combined master developer capital portfolio.

accounts.name: TASMU
accounts.tip: Qatar Smart City Programme. Incumbent delivery context — post-deployment expansion and iCCC advisory re-engagement.

engagements.title: iCCC Re-engagement — Concept Proposal
engagements.description: Initial re-engagement scoping with TASMU programme leadership on iCCC governance continuity and platform evolution.

engagements.title: Smart City Platform Evolution & iCCC Governance
engagements.description: Post-deployment platform evolution: extending the iCCC into new operational domains, integrating with ongoing capital delivery programmes, and building the digital twin operational intelligence layer.

engagements.title: Digital Twin Operational Intelligence
engagements.description: Digital Twin operational intelligence and post-deployment asset performance advisory — the layer not included in the original build mandate.
